reviews.review_title: Best app for auto-play of 360 videos
reviews.review_description: Great and simple app and friendly assistance, helpful and quick answers

developer_response.body: Thank you very much. Great to hear that the software works out good for your VR projects!
Thank you very much! We are glad to hear that you like it!

reviews.review_title: EZ 360 lives up to its name
reviews.review_description: I am so happy that EZ 360 lives up to its name and reputation.  It really has been easy to share our 3D big cat videos using this app.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We're happy that we can support your VR project with EZ360!

reviews.review_description: EZ360  is very easy to use and was perfect for my event with 20 x Oculus Go headsets.
The demo stuff was pretty boring

I have used EZ360 for 5 big events where I showed off a Venice Film Festival award winning film. It worked great and sooo much easier than trying to explain to people how Oculus GO controllers work. Admittedly I manually installed the movies using my computer since the though of using an Internet connection really didn't make sense to me when the headsets were right here.  I'm keeping my $100/month on this product until something better comes along. Nothing else right now can support up to 20 headsets for such a low price, even if some of the features aren't working perfectly yet. I've also had very responsive and courteous customer support so this is great product in my opinion. Thanks!

developer_response.body: Great to hear that EZ360 did its job nicely for the 5 events you had for the Venice Film Festival award-winning film! We're continuously improving our solution and try to offer the best service out there. We really appreciate your feedback, thank you! Team EZ360

reviews.review_description: Big breakthrough....this app was needed for a long time.... great work and amazing customer service

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review Jely17!

reviews.review_description: Its auto download without any notifications on my mobile data
